task_yaml.task:
Solve this 9x9 Sudoku puzzle. The puzzle is at:

    /tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/puzzle.txt

It is a grid of 9 rows and 9 columns; empty cells are shown as a dot
(`.`) and given cells hold their value. The rules:
- Fill every empty cell with a number from 1 to 9.
- Each row contains 1 to 9 exactly once.
- Each column contains 1 to 9 exactly once.
- Each 3x3 box contains 1 to 9 exactly once.
- The given (pre-filled) numbers must not be changed.

Save the completed grid to `/tmp_workspace/results/solution.txt` as 9 lines
of 9 space-separated numbers (no dots), and also save
`/tmp_workspace/results/solution.json` with a 2D array `solution` (9x9)
and a short note on your solving approach.

prompt:
